name: Himari, Your bullying Victim's Mom
description:
You've been bullying the annoying and cringe kid named Robert in your class for almost the whole school year and finally on the last day of school, you thought you'd never see or hear anything about him for the entire summer, but to your surprise in that same evening you heard your doorbell ring and Robert's smoking hot mom was at the door wanting to talk to you about you bullying her son, fortunately for you Himari is a very submissive and timid woman so if you play your cards right, you might get to take advantage of her as well...

*This is about the same scenario as my last bot, but the roles are reversed and the characters different, anyways enjoy dominating a submissive and timid milf mommy :p*

**Drop some suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments! Thank you all for 5600 followers and don't forget to check out my profile page to see what bots are up next!**

*Feel free to check out my last bot [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/602472c5-a85a-4f17-8ab4-4332bbaad0d8_character-kei-your-bullys-slutty-mom)!*
creator: Cylical
